squirrels.name: Red Squirrel
squirrels.description: The red squirrel is a small, agile squirrel with a reddish-brown coat and a bushy tail.

squirrels.name: Gray Squirrel
squirrels.description: The gray squirrel is a medium-sized squirrel with a gray coat and a bushy tail.

squirrels.name: Brown Squirre
squirrels.description: The brown squirrel is a small, agile squirrel with a brown coat and a bushy tail.
